name: Split Vertical (Screen + Person) with Particle-Burst Captions
description: BIZDRIVE-style vertical talking-head: clean top/bottom split — top frame is the screen recording (top.mp4), bottom frame is the person as a full-width rectangle (bottom.mp4) — with BIZDRIVE particle-burst captions (same word-pop + gold #FFD700 system as Template 01) placed CENTERED over the seam. The particle-burst sibling of Template 08 (identical split layout; T08 = karaoke word-sweep, T09 = particle-burst). Single-presenter audio: bottom.mp4 is the master, top.mp4 (screen) is muted.

bottomFrame.content: person face-cam (bottom.mp4), object-fit cover, NO circle crop

layout.captionPosition: centered over the seam, bottom: 910px. This position is HARDCODED in scripts/build-burst-captions.py (lines `bottom: 910px` / particle `bottom: 970px`); the burst builder reads the groups JSON + duration from fixed paths and does NOT read argv. tools/v88-clip.sh sets CAPTION_BOTTOM=910 for T09 to match (the burst builder ignores it; only the highlight builder reads it).

captions.style: BIZDRIVE particle-burst — each caption group pops word-by-word with a 10-particle burst; brand/number/tech tokens render gold (#FFD700). Same system + colors as Template 01. Positioned centered over the seam between the two frames (bottom 910), sitting on a rounded BIZDRIVE-blue pill (.bs-pill) with a gold border + backdrop blur for readability over video.
captions.goldTokenRules: numbers, monetary figures, durations, brand/tech names, headline tickers

audio.note: Single-presenter: bottom.mp4 (person) is the audio master; top.mp4 (screen recording) is muted. Both video divs are muted in the composition; final audio is the polished speech_polished.wav derived from bottom_visual_master.mp4.
audio.polishChain: highpass80, lowpass12k, afftdn, agate, acompressor, loudnorm 2-pass, alimiter, apad

broll.host: top frame (screen) — B-roll inserts cover the screen recording while the person keeps talking
broll.aiGenNote: seedance-1-5-pro chosen 2026-05-20: ~$0.02 per 3-5s clip at 720p, ~10x cheaper than seedance-2.0-fast at equivalent quality. Use resolution 720p, 16:9, generate_audio false.

sfx.pacing: ~1 SFX per 12s of final video; fewer for clips under 60s
sfx.note: Every clip gets SFX but kept sparse — at most 5, each context-matched to the beat it lands on (whoosh on transitions, ding on CTA/follow-card, punch on punchlines, riser before reveals). mix-sfx.py enforces the rule and writes output/finals/final.mp4.

label.th: ตัดช่วงเงียบ (dead air)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 6 (Silero VAD); Step 7 ใช้แค่ rough EDL — คงจังหวะพูดเดิมไว้

label.th: ปรับแต่งเสียงพูด (polish)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 8 — ใช้เสียงดิบจาก visual master; Step 9 re-transcribe ใช้เสียงดิบแทน

label.th: ซับ / คำบรรยายไทย

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 9-11 ส่วน caption (re-transcribe, post-process subagent, build-*-captions.py); ไม่ mount caption track
ข้าม generate-broll + add-broll.py — ไม่มีภาพแทรก

label.th: จำนวนสูงสุด
เพลงประกอบ (BGM)

features.whenOff: mix-sfx.py ข้าม BGM — final.mp4 = speech (+ SFX) เท่านั้น

label.th: ระดับเสียง
เอฟเฟกต์เสียง (SFX)

features.whenOff: sfx-plan.json มี sfx: [] ว่าง — ไม่มีเอฟเฟกต์เสียง
ข้าม Step 16 — ส่งมอบ output/finals/final.mp4 โดยไม่ฝัง cover art

label.th: บรรทัดบน (ขาว)
บรรทัดเด่น (ทอง)
บรรทัดล่าง (ฟ้า)

reference.note: New template created 2026-06-08; no locked golden-reference clip yet. Same split layout as Template 08 (screen top + person rectangle bottom); the only difference is the caption system — T09 uses particle-burst (gold #FFD700, like Template 01) via scripts/build-burst-captions.py, T08 uses karaoke highlight. Pipeline contract is identical to T08/T01 (bottom.mp4 = audio master, top.mp4 = muted screen) so the locked v88 16-step flow is unchanged — only the caption renderer differs. Validate + render confirmed on a reused clip (Claude Code ยากไหม): lint 0 errors/0 layout issues, final.mp4 -16.4 LUFS. Lock a golden reference after a purpose-built clip.
